description: Determines the nature of the creature's gaze attack.

descriptionTranslations.en: Determines the nature of the creature's gaze attack.

entries.description: If the victim fails to resist, he dies immediately. Otherwise, he suffers no harm.

descriptionTranslations.en: If the victim fails to resist, he dies immediately. Otherwise, he suffers no harm.

entries.description: Failed resistance means the victim is transformed somehow, such as turned to stone or turned into a pig.

descriptionTranslations.en: Failed resistance means the victim is transformed somehow, such as turned to stone or turned into a pig.

entries.description: Failed resistance results in some form of mind control, such as hypnosis.

descriptionTranslations.en: Failed resistance results in some form of mind control, such as hypnosis.
